body.title: Fix pre-existing failures in test_dicksimnel_channel.py
body.result: autouse no_bus fixture + log message assertion fix — 10/10 tests pass
body.intention: I intend that the 6 pre-existing channel test failures are fixed by correcting the mock target paths.
body.description:
6 tests in tests/inference/test_dicksimnel_channel.py fail pre-existing (confirmed by git stash check 2026-06-12). All failures related to post_to_channel not being called in _post_result mock setup — mock target is wrong (module path changed or import path). Not caused by T-json-envelope-inference.

**Affected files:** tests/inference/test_dicksimnel_channel.py, devices/dicksimnel/device.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Fix mock paths so channel post tests pass. No device logic changes.
**Completion criteria:** `python3 -m pytest tests/inference/test_dicksimnel_channel.py` shows 0 failures.
